title: OpenAI Codex Mobile Added Defaults, Windows SSH, And Side Chat Controls
summary: OpenAI's Codex changelog for ChatGPT iOS 1.2026.146 records Codex Mobile support for Queue or Steer default follow-up behavior, code-diff line wrapping, Windows SSH connections, side conversations, and device-lock controls.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Update Codex Mobile team runbooks for follow-up defaults, line wrapping, Windows SSH host setup, side-chat workflows, and mobile task-lock expectations before comparing behavior with earlier iOS builds.
Decide whether mobile device-lock controls should be required for teams that review Codex tasks or changed files on iOS.

detail.change_summary: ChatGPT for iOS 1.2026.146 changed Codex Mobile workflow behavior around follow-up defaults, code-diff display, Windows SSH host access, side conversations, and mobile task-lock controls.

limitations: APW records official changelog metadata only; exact mobile rollout and account eligibility can vary.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
